cards.title: Ambiguity
cards.text: People cannot easily understand what is being asked of them.

cards.title: Complexity
cards.text: People must work too hard to understand what is happening.

cards.title: Jargon
cards.text: Specialist language creates barriers to understanding.

cards.title: Assumptions
cards.text: People are expected to know things that have not been explained.

cards.title: Hidden Meaning
cards.text: Important information is implied rather than stated.

cards.title: Information Gap
cards.text: People lack the information needed to make progress.

cards.title: Unclear Purpose
cards.text: People do not understand why they are being asked to do something.

cards.title: Poor Instructions
cards.text: Guidance is difficult to follow or incomplete.

cards.title: Missing Context
cards.text: People are not given enough background to understand the situation.

cards.title: Comprehension Failure
cards.text: People misunderstand the information being presented.

cards.title: Recall
cards.text: People must remember information that is no longer visible.

cards.title: Context Loss
cards.text: People lose track of where they are or what they were doing.

cards.title: Repetition
cards.text: People are repeatedly asked for the same information.

cards.title: Forgotten Instructions
cards.text: People cannot easily refer back to previous guidance.

cards.title: Interrupted Task
cards.text: People lose momentum and must restart their thinking.

cards.title: Working Memory Load
cards.text: People must hold too much information in their mind at once.

cards.title: Hidden Information
cards.text: Important details are unavailable when they are needed.

cards.title: Dependency
cards.text: Progress depends on remembering something from an earlier step.

cards.title: Remembering Across Steps
cards.text: People must carry information between different stages of a task.

cards.title: Lost Reference
cards.text: People cannot easily find information they previously saw.

cards.title: Overload
cards.text: People are being asked to process too much at once.

cards.title: Distraction
cards.text: Competing elements pull attention away from the task.

cards.title: Saturation
cards.text: The volume of information exceeds people's capacity to process it.

cards.title: Noise
cards.text: Irrelevant information makes important information harder to find.

cards.title: Competing Priorities
cards.text: Multiple demands make it difficult to focus on what matters.

cards.title: Visual Clutter
cards.text: Too many visual elements compete for attention.

cards.title: Attention Drift
cards.text: People struggle to maintain focus throughout the task.

cards.title: Interruptions
cards.text: The flow of attention is repeatedly broken.

cards.title: Fragmentation
cards.text: Information is scattered across multiple locations.

cards.title: Scanning Burden
cards.text: People must search too hard to find what they need.

cards.title: Choice Overload
cards.text: Too many options make decision-making harder.

cards.title: Uncertainty
cards.text: People cannot tell what will happen next.

cards.title: Comparison Difficulty
cards.text: Options are difficult to compare and evaluate.

cards.title: Decision Fatigue
cards.text: Repeated decisions reduce confidence and effectiveness.

cards.title: Commitment Anxiety
cards.text: People worry about making the wrong choice.

cards.title: Risk Assessment
cards.text: People struggle to understand the consequences of their choices.

cards.title: Conflicting Options
cards.text: Available choices appear to contradict each other.

cards.title: Lack of Confidence
cards.text: People do not feel confident enough to proceed.

cards.title: Hidden Consequences
cards.text: The impact of a decision is not immediately clear.

cards.title: Too Many Steps
cards.text: The path to a decision feels unnecessarily long or difficult.

cards.title: Lost Progress
cards.text: People lose their place and must start again.

cards.title: Dead End
cards.text: People reach a point where they cannot continue.

cards.title: Unclear Next Step
cards.text: People do not know what they should do next.

cards.title: Poor Feedback
cards.text: The system does not clearly communicate what is happening.

cards.title: Orientation Loss
cards.text: People lose track of where they are within the experience.

cards.title: Hidden Route
cards.text: The path forward is difficult to discover.

cards.title: Unexpected Outcome
cards.text: The result differs from what people reasonably expected.

cards.title: Recovery Failure
cards.text: People cannot easily recover from mistakes.

cards.title: Journey Friction
cards.text: Unnecessary obstacles slow progress toward a goal.

cards.title: No Way Back
cards.text: People cannot easily reverse or undo their actions.

cards.title: Low Contrast
cards.text: Important information is difficult to distinguish from its background.

cards.title: Missing Alternative Text
cards.text: Visual content is unavailable to people who cannot see it.

cards.title: Colour Dependence
cards.text: Information can only be understood through colour.

cards.title: Small Text
cards.text: Text is difficult to read without magnification.

cards.title: Zoom Failure
cards.text: Content becomes unusable when enlarged.

cards.title: Hidden Content
cards.text: Important information disappears at different screen sizes.

cards.title: Visual Overload
cards.text: The presentation makes key information difficult to locate.

cards.title: Poor Focus Visibility
cards.text: People cannot easily see where focus currently is.

cards.title: Information in Images
cards.text: Critical information is embedded inside graphics.

cards.title: Unreadable Layout
cards.text: The arrangement of content makes reading difficult.

cards.title: Missing Captions
cards.text: Spoken information is unavailable in text form.

cards.title: No Transcript
cards.text: Audio content cannot be reviewed in written form.

cards.title: Audio Only Information
cards.text: Important information is delivered only through sound.

cards.title: Poor Audio Quality
cards.text: Audio is difficult to understand.

cards.title: Missing Alerts
cards.text: Important notifications rely solely on sound.

cards.title: Background Noise
cards.text: Competing sounds interfere with understanding.

cards.title: Unclear Speech
cards.text: Speech lacks sufficient clarity.

cards.title: No Visual Equivalent
cards.text: Audio information has no visual alternative.

cards.title: Autoplay Audio
cards.text: Unexpected sound disrupts the experience.

cards.title: Missing Signposting
cards.text: Audio content lacks structure or navigation cues.

cards.title: Keyboard Trap
cards.text: People cannot easily move through the experience using a keyboard.

cards.title: Small Target
cards.text: Interactive elements are difficult to activate accurately.

cards.title: Time Pressure
cards.text: Tasks must be completed within restrictive time limits.

cards.title: Drag Requirement
cards.text: Actions depend on dragging movements.

cards.title: Gesture Dependency
cards.text: Interaction relies on complex gestures.

cards.title: Complex Input
cards.text: Tasks require unnecessary precision or effort.

cards.title: Accidental Activation
cards.text: Controls are triggered unintentionally.

cards.title: Inconsistent Controls
cards.text: Interactions behave differently across the experience.

cards.title: Difficult Forms
cards.text: Form completion requires excessive effort.

cards.title: Interaction Failure
cards.text: People are unable to complete intended actions.

cards.title: Unclear Error
cards.text: People cannot understand what went wrong.

cards.title: Missing Feedback
cards.text: The system does not confirm actions or outcomes.

cards.title: Validation Failure
cards.text: People are not told how to correct mistakes.

cards.title: Ambiguous Labels
cards.text: Labels do not clearly describe their purpose.

cards.title: Status Unclear
cards.text: People cannot determine the current state of the system.

cards.title: System Silence
cards.text: The system provides no meaningful response.

cards.title: Confusing Messages
cards.text: Communication increases uncertainty rather than clarity.

cards.title: Hidden Errors
cards.text: Problems are not obvious or discoverable.

cards.title: Poor Confirmation
cards.text: People are unsure whether an action succeeded.

cards.title: Communication Breakdown
cards.text: The exchange between person and system fails.

cards.title: Screen Reader Failure
cards.text: Assistive technologies cannot access content correctly.

cards.title: Zoom Restriction
cards.text: People cannot enlarge content effectively.

cards.title: Customisation Blocked
cards.text: Personal preferences cannot be applied.

cards.title: Assistive Technology Conflict
cards.text: The experience does not work with assistive tools.

cards.title: Fixed Layout
cards.text: Content cannot adapt to different needs or contexts.

cards.title: Responsive Failure
cards.text: The experience breaks across devices or viewports.

cards.title: Device Dependency
cards.text: Tasks can only be completed on specific devices.

cards.title: Compatibility Issue
cards.text: Technology combinations create barriers.

cards.title: Unsupported Preference
cards.text: User settings are ignored or overridden.

cards.title: Technology Barrier
cards.text: Technical limitations prevent successful participation.
